_comment: Additive GCP deployment layer over v8-controller: configured as its own pack slot (e.g. backend-gcp) alongside the base pack, generated after the base stack exists. Ships only deployment surface (Dockerfile, Cloud Build pipeline, production appsettings) — no C# and no injections, so its marker namespace cannot collide with the base version's.

targets._comment: Cloud Run container image (multi-stage dotnet 8 build)
Cloud Build pipeline: build, push to Artifact Registry, deploy to Cloud Run
Production appsettings for GCP (Cloud Run port binding, structured logging)
